creator: fenner@parc.xerox.com
text:
I dunno if this is qt version skew or what, but in order to get xglobe
to work with qt-1.42, I had to change patch-aa:


--- patch-aa.orig	Sun Jan 24 13:03:05 1999
+++ patch-aa	Sun Jan 24 13:03:14 1999
@@ -50,7 +50,7 @@
   ####### Library directories - you may need to modify these
   
   X11_INCLUDE_DIR = /usr/X11R6/include
-! QT_INCLUDE_DIR  = /usr/X11R6/share/include/X11/qt
+! QT_INCLUDE_DIR  = /usr/X11R6/include/X11/qt
   
 ! QT_LIB_DIR      = /usr/X11R6/lib
   X11_LIB_DIR     = /usr/X11R6/lib

 Bill
